methods.description: Process for collecting and storing fossil specimens from the site for further analysis.

steps.description: A total of 554 specimens were collected from the fossil site.
All specimens are stored at the School of Earth Science and Resources, Chang'an University, Xi'an, China.

methods.description: Procedure for examining and photographing fossil specimens for documentation and analysis.

steps.description: After preparation, all fossils were examined and photographed using a digital single-lens reflex camera (Nikon D90) and an Olympus SZ61 stereomicroscope.
steps.searchable_summary: examine and photograph fossils with Nikon D90 and Olympus SZ61

steps.description: Edited with the help of Adobe Photoshop CC.
steps.searchable_summary: edit fossil photographs using Adobe Photoshop CC

methods.description: Method for identifying fossil specimens by comparing them with extant species using digital herbarium catalogs.

steps.description: To achieve reliable identification of the fossil specimens, various extant species were critically examined using digital herbarium catalogs, viz., Kew herbarium catalog.
steps.searchable_summary: compare fossil specimens with extant species using Kew herbarium catalog
